revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:Aarne-Thompson Grouping]] to [[:Category:Aarne-Thompson grouping]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2024 December 18#Category:Aarne-Thompson Grouping]]
1 revision imported: mass importing wikipedia categories
fixing the uncategorized categories error
Adding [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{Non-diffusing parent category|ATU 480 The Kind and the Unkind Girls}} '''ATU 460-499''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural Tasks'' range.
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Aarne-Thompson grouping]] [[Category:kk]][[category:kk]]

{{Non-diffusing parent category|ATU 480 The Kind and the Unkind Girls}} '''ATU 460-499''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural Tasks'' range.
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Aarne-Thompson grouping]] [[Category:Category]][[category:Category]]

{{Non-diffusing parent category|ATU 480 The Kind and the Unkind Girls}} '''ATU 460-499''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural Tasks'' range.
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Aarne-Thompson grouping]] [[Category]][[category]]

{{Non-diffusing parent category|ATU 480 The Kind and the Unkind Girls}} '''ATU 460-499''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural Tasks'' range.
[[Category:Uncategorized categories]][[Category:Aarne-Thompson grouping]] [[Category]][[category]] [[Category:New]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:New]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]

Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats

Text replacement - "[[:en:Category|Category]]" to ""
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="

Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""

==Old Content== {{Non-diffusing parent category|ATU 480 The Kind and the Unkind Girls}} '''ATU 460-499''' represents a range of ATU numbers. The [[:en:Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index|Aarne–Thompson–Uther Index]] catalogues specific themes found in folktales. The tales in this category are catalogued using numbers within the broad ''Supernatural Tasks'' range.
